description: Cancellation path with active LP cohort, refunds, and post-refund LP residual claims.
Earlier and later LP cohorts both add the same delta-b under different market states.
Long-tail market with many outcomes and one late LP entry.
Near-neutral market with one late LP joining after balanced trading.
Multiple LP cohorts join during active trading, including after an intermediate sell.
Same-block reordering stress test around LP entry and adjacent trades.
Same final claims and LP size, but different LP entry timing for fairness/path-dependence comparison.
Skewed market where an LP joins after one-sided order flow develops.
Zero-flow LP entry sanity check: no trades after entry, used for NAV invariance validation.
